inboundText:
DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZE('Color Dimension', 'Color Dimension'[Color.Key0], 'Color Dimension'[Color])

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(501, __DS0Core, 'Color Dimension'[Color], 1, 'Color Dimension'[Color.Key0], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'Color Dimension'[Color], 'Color Dimension'[Color.Key0]
outboundText:
SELECT
   "t_28"."Color Dimension[Color.Key0]" AS "Color Dimension[Color.Key0]",
   "t_28"."Color Dimension[Color]" AS "Color Dimension[Color]"
FROM
(
   SELECT
      CASE WHEN ("factinternetsales_t26"."product_info" IS NULL) THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE(SUBSTRING("factinternetsales_t26"."product_info", CAST('(?:^|,)color:([^,]+)' AS TEXT)), CAST('' AS TEXT)) END AS "Color Dimension[Color.Key0]",
      CASE WHEN ("factinternetsales_t26"."product_info" IS NULL) THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE(SUBSTRING("factinternetsales_t26"."product_info", CAST('(?:^|,)color:([^,]+)' AS TEXT)), CAST('' AS TEXT)) END AS "Color Dimension[Color]"
   FROM
      "SalesInsights"."factinternetsales" AS "factinternetsales_t26"
   WHERE
      true
   GROUP BY
      1,
      2
) AS "t_28"
GROUP BY
   1,
   2
ORDER BY
   2 ASC NULLS FIRST,
   1 ASC NULLS FIRST
LIMIT 501

inboundText:
DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL(
				ROLLUPGROUP('Color Dimension'[Color.Key0], 'Color Dimension'[Color]), "IsGrandTotalRowTotal"
			),
			"salesamount1", 'CubeMeasures'[salesamount1],
			"salesamount1_FormatString", IGNORE('CubeMeasures'[salesamount1.FormatString])
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(
			502,
			__DS0Core,
			[IsGrandTotalRowTotal],
			0,
			'Color Dimension'[Color],
			1,
			'Color Dimension'[Color.Key0],
			1
		)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC,
	'Color Dimension'[Color],
	'Color Dimension'[Color.Key0]
outboundText:
SELECT
   "t_62"."Color Dimension[Color.Key0]" AS "Color Dimension[Color.Key0]",
   "t_62"."Color Dimension[Color]" AS "Color Dimension[Color]",
   "t_62"."[IsGrandTotalRowTotal]" AS "[IsGrandTotalRowTotal]",
   MIN("t_62"."[salesamount1]") AS "[salesamount1]",
   "t_62"."[salesamount1_FormatString]" AS "[salesamount1_FormatString]"
FROM
(
   SELECT
      "t_61"."Color Dimension[Color.Key0]" AS "Color Dimension[Color.Key0]",
      "t_61"."Color Dimension[Color]" AS "Color Dimension[Color]",
      "t_61"."[IsGrandTotalRowTotal]" AS "[IsGrandTotalRowTotal]",
      MIN("t_61"."[salesamount1]") AS "[salesamount1]",
      "t_61"."[salesamount1_FormatString]" AS "[salesamount1_FormatString]"
   FROM
   (
      SELECT
         "t_60"."Color Dimension[Color.Key0]" AS "Color Dimension[Color.Key0]",
         "t_60"."Color Dimension[Color]" AS "Color Dimension[Color]",
         "t_60"."[IsGrandTotalRowTotal]" AS "[IsGrandTotalRowTotal]",
         MIN("t_60"."[salesamount1]") AS "[salesamount1]",
         "t_60"."[salesamount1_FormatString]" AS "[salesamount1_FormatString]"
      FROM
      (
            SELECT
               CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS "Color Dimension[Color.Key0]",
               CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS "Color Dimension[Color]",
               true AS "[IsGrandTotalRowTotal]",
               SUM(CAST("factinternetsales_t34"."salesamount" AS FLOAT8)) AS "[salesamount1]",
               CAST('$#,##0.00' AS TEXT) AS "[salesamount1_FormatString]"
            FROM
               "SalesInsights"."factinternetsales" AS "factinternetsales_t34"
            WHERE
               true
            GROUP BY
               1,
               2,
               3,
               5
         UNION ALL
            SELECT
               CASE WHEN ("factinternetsales_t55"."product_info" IS NULL) THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE(SUBSTRING("factinternetsales_t55"."product_info", CAST('(?:^|,)color:([^,]+)' AS TEXT)), CAST('' AS TEXT)) END AS "Color Dimension[Color.Key0]",
               CASE WHEN ("factinternetsales_t55"."product_info" IS NULL) THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE(SUBSTRING("factinternetsales_t55"."product_info", CAST('(?:^|,)color:([^,]+)' AS TEXT)), CAST('' AS TEXT)) END AS "Color Dimension[Color]",
               false AS "[IsGrandTotalRowTotal]",
               SUM(CAST("factinternetsales_t55"."salesamount" AS FLOAT8)) AS "[salesamount1]",
               CAST('$#,##0.00' AS TEXT) AS "[salesamount1_FormatString]"
            FROM
               "SalesInsights"."factinternetsales" AS "factinternetsales_t55"
            WHERE
               true
            GROUP BY
               1,
               2,
               3,
               5
      ) AS "t_60"
      GROUP BY
         1,
         2,
         3,
         5
   ) AS "t_61"
   GROUP BY
      1,
      2,
      3,
      5
) AS "t_62"
GROUP BY
   1,
   2,
   3,
   5
ORDER BY
   3 DESC NULLS LAST,
   2 ASC NULLS FIRST,
   1 ASC NULLS FIRST
LIMIT 502
